text_original: He who would assist a lord of men in harmony with the Dao will not assert his mastery in the kingdom by force of arms.
text_normalized: He who would assist a lord of men in harmony with the Dao will not assert his mastery in the kingdom by force of arms.

text_original: Such a course is sure to meet with its proper return.
text_normalized: Such a course is sure to meet with its proper return.

text_original: Wherever a host is stationed, briars and thorns spring up.
text_normalized: Wherever a host is stationed, briars and thorns spring up.

text_original: In the sequence of great armies there are sure to be bad years.
text_normalized: In the sequence of great armies there are sure to be bad years.

text_original: A skilful (commander) strikes a decisive blow, and stops.
text_normalized: A skilful (commander) strikes a decisive blow, and stops.

text_original: He does not dare (by continuing his operations) to assert and complete his mastery.
text_normalized: He does not dare (by continuing his operations) to assert and complete his mastery.

text_original: He will strike the blow, but will be on his guard against being vain or boastful or arrogant in consequence of it.
text_normalized: He will strike the blow, but will be on his guard against being vain or boastful or arrogant in consequence of it.

text_original: He strikes it as a matter of necessity;
text_normalized: He strikes it as a matter of necessity;

text_original: he strikes it, but not from a wish for mastery.
text_normalized: he strikes it, but not from a wish for mastery.

text_original: When things have attained their strong maturity they become old.
text_normalized: When things have attained their strong maturity they become old.

text_original: This may be said to be not in accordance with the Dao:
text_normalized: This may be said to be not in accordance with the Dao:

text_original: and what is not in accordance with it soon comes to an end.
text_normalized: and what is not in accordance with it soon comes to an end.
